blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for an extensible event payload.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having an extensible event payload for domain-specific details. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific examples or details of event payloads that demonstrate extensibility. The linked use case mentions the need for extensible event payloads but lacks concrete evidence of their implementation or existence, leading to an inconclusive status.
